ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alias or nickname of the driver */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account associated with the driver */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the driver */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team name of the driver */,
  "car_number" INTEGER /* Car number of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., driver, admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of racing event (e.g., Formula 1, IndyCar) */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the driver in the leaderboard */,
  "submission_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the leaderboard submission */,
  "avg_lap_time" REAL /* Average lap time of the driver */,
  "best_lap_time" REAL /* Best lap time of the driver */,
  "total_lap_time" REAL /* Total lap time of the driver */,
  "penalty_time" REAL /* Total penalty time added to the driver's lap time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard submission */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leaderboard entry */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the leaderboard submission (e.g., SUCCESS, FAILURE) */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of leaderboard submission (e.g., official, unofficial) */,
  "submission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_submissions_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing statistic */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "lap_count" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver */,
  "avg_lap_time" REAL /* Average lap time of the driver */,
  "best_lap_time" REAL /* Best lap time of the driver */,
  "total_lap_time" REAL /* Total lap time of the driver */,
  "avg_resets" REAL /* Average number of resets per lap */,
  "collision_count" INTEGER /* Number of collisions */,
  "off_track_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the driver went off track */,
  "reset_count" INTEGER /* Number of resets */,
  "submission_count" INTEGER /* Number of submissions */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_statistics_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lap_times" (
  "lap_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap time */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leaderboard entry */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  "sector_1_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete sector 1 of the lap */,
  "sector_2_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete sector 2 of the lap */,
  "sector_3_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete sector 3 of the lap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leaderboard entry */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., collision, off track) */,
  "penalty_time" REAL /* Time added to the driver's total lap time due to the penalty */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard ranking */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leaderboard entry */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the driver in the leaderboard */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_rankings_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_rankings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking score */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leaderboard ranking */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the driver in the leaderboard */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., fastest lap, total points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_scores_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES leaderboard_rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver standing */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the event */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the event */,
  "finish_status" TEXT /* Finish status of the driver (e.g., finished, DNF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_calendar" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event calendar entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of racing event (e.g., Formula 1, IndyCar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_calendar_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the racing season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the racing season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_events" (
  "season_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season event */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing season */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_events_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing team */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Principal of the racing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_teams" (
  "driver_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver-team association */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_teams_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
